channel.title: Akkireddy Challa — Writing
channel.description: Engineering notes from cloud, DevOps, SRE, and AI platform work.

item.title: Practical infrastructure foundations for AI teams
item.description: Governed environments, scalable compute, artifact paths, cost controls, and deployment foundations.

item.title: Observability foundations for platform teams
item.description: How to move from dashboards to signals, ownership, and reliable incident response.

item.title: Terraform best practices I keep coming back to
item.description: Patterns for state, modules, reviews, naming, and repeatable infrastructure delivery.

item.title: How I think about building a cloud platform operating model
item.description: A practical model for reliability, delivery speed, IAM, observability, and cost ownership.
